function.message: No recorded message from Oskar Novak was found in any channel transcript, so there is no exact message text to quote.
function.rulebook_notes: Used canonical entity record for identity resolution, then exhaustively read all channel logs as message history source; absence of data must be OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION, not OUTCOME_OK.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical file 10_entities/cast/oskar.md identifies the target as Oskar Novak (alias oskar). Across all channel logs in 60_outbox/channels, no message block is authored by Oskar/oskar/entity.oskar. Therefore the requested 'last recorded message' does not exist in available records.
